title: Use docker/distribution/digest
body:
use docker/distribution/digest instead of string, 
mainly test patch containers/image#163, should not merge before that.

cc @runcom

comments.body: @mtrmac fixed and updated image vendor as well.
LGTM, please drop the `hack/vendor.sh` part, and rerun `hack/vendor.sh`.
@mtrmac ~~updated.~~ Sorry I have not rerun `vendor.sh` yet
@mtrmac OK, checked, it's already the latest image master branch.
